---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new rules file, hook fix, or improvement to existing rules
title: "[feat] <brief description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What Problem Does This Solve?

Describe the gap in the current rules layer. What situation isn't handled well?

## Proposed Solution

What new rule, rules file, or documentation would fix it?

If proposing a new rules file:
- What is the single concern it addresses?
- What trigger would cause Claude to apply it?
- Does it conflict with any existing rule? How is that resolved?

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Would you like to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR
- [ ] No, just suggesting
